# historyItemLimit

**Instance Property**

The maximum number of web history items that can be stored.

## Declaration

```swift
var historyItemLimit: Int32 { get set }
```

## Getting and Setting Attributes

- **historyAgeInDaysLimit**: The maximum age of web history items that can be retrieved.
